creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
You will have to update all of your installed ports. The 1.73 is too old.  
We have 1.76 in ports tree. If you still have this problem, you will have  
to recompile transmission with the debug and run it in gdb to collect the  
backtraces.

I can't reproduce this problem.

Cheers,
Mezz
